name: @ghost-ui/react
description: React 19 bindings for Ghost UI — components, hooks, Motion integration.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external motion
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --watch --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external motion
